single.reason: The app ships with a fixed set of four starter counters and has no add or delete UI, so a one-counter state cannot occur

many.reason: The switcher holds a fixed four counters that always fit, so there is no overflow or truncation state

loading.reason: Counter state is read synchronously from on-device storage at launch, so there is no asynchronous loading state

error.reason: The view has no network or other fallible data source, so no error state can occur
